items.definition_en: Turmeric is a yellow spice made from the root of a plant.
items.example_en: Turmeric gives curry its yellow color.

items.definition_en: Saffron is a red spice made from the dried stigmas of a flower.
items.example_en: Saffron is used to flavor and color rice dishes.

items.definition_en: Black pepper is a common spice made from dried berries.
items.example_en: Add some black pepper to the soup for extra flavor.

items.definition_en: White pepper is made from ripe pepper berries with the skin removed.
items.example_en: White pepper is often used in light-colored sauces.

items.definition_en: Curry powder is a mix of many spices often used in Indian cooking.
items.example_en: She added curry powder to the chicken for more taste.

items.definition_en: Allspice is a spice made from dried berries that tastes like a mix of cloves, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
items.example_en: Allspice is often added to stews and baked goods.

items.definition_en: Mustard seed is the small round seed used to make mustard condiments.
items.example_en: Mustard seed gives pickles a strong flavor.

items.definition_en: Star anise is a spice shaped like a star and tastes like licorice.
items.example_en: Star anise is popular in Asian soups and stews.

items.definition_en: Lemongrass is an herb with a strong citrus flavor used in cooking.
items.example_en: Lemongrass adds a bright taste to Thai dishes.

items.definition_en: Marjoram is a green herb related to oregano with a mild flavor.
items.example_en: She sprinkled marjoram over the roasted potatoes.

items.definition_en: Curry leaf is an aromatic leaf used in Indian and Asian cooking.
items.example_en: Fresh curry leaves are added to many Indian dishes.

items.definition_en: Garlic powder is a seasoning made from dried and ground garlic.
items.example_en: Garlic powder can replace fresh garlic in many recipes.

items.definition_en: Onion powder is a seasoning made from dried and ground onions.
items.example_en: Onion powder adds extra flavor to sauces and soups.

items.definition_en: Chive is a thin green herb that tastes like a mild onion.
items.example_en: Chive is often added to salads and scrambled eggs.

items.definition_en: Wasabi is a green, spicy paste often served with sushi.
items.example_en: She likes to eat her sushi with extra wasabi.

items.definition_en: Celery seed is a tiny seed used as a spice to add celery flavor.
items.example_en: Celery seed is sometimes used in salad dressings.

items.definition_en: A pink peppercorn is a dried berry with a sweet, peppery taste.
items.example_en: Pink peppercorn can be used in both sweet and savory dishes.

items.definition_en: Five-spice powder is a Chinese blend of five different spices.
items.example_en: He added five-spice powder to the stir fry for extra flavor.

items.definition_en: Herbes de Provence is a mix of dried herbs from southern France.
items.example_en: Herbes de Provence are sprinkled over grilled chicken.

items.definition_en: Sea salt is salt made by evaporating seawater and is less processed than table salt.
items.example_en: She prefers to use sea salt in her cooking.
